overview: revAlife is a premium Indian health & wellness e-commerce platform with a full product catalog, shopping cart, checkout, user accounts, an AI health assistant, and an admin panel for managing products — all designed with a mobile-first, clean white and green aesthetic.
features: Admin panel to add, edit, and delete products with image uploads
8–10 pre-seeded Indian wellness products across multiple categories
Full checkout with UPI, Card, Netbanking, and COD options
Internet Identity login with My Account, order history, and saved addresses
Rule-based AI Health Assistant for FAQ and product guidance
Product recommendation engine based on lifestyle and wellness goals
Footer pages: About, Science, Contact, Privacy, Terms, FAQs, Shipping, Returns, Order Tracking
Mobile-first white and green design with trust badges and clean typography
